markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 21, 2026 10 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 85.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 85.99° on Jun 21, 2026 at 10am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Minnesota and Arizona tie in the first 5 innings of the Minnesota vs Arizona professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 21, 2026 at 3:15 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market refers to the first 5 innings of the Minnesota vs Arizona professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 21, 2026 at 3:15 PM EDT. If the score at the end of the first 5 innings is tied, the "Tie" strike will resolve to Yes and all team strikes will resolve to No. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days).
markets.title: Minnesota vs Arizona first 5 innings winner?
